steps.title: Find the possible total range
steps.content:
Each tray has at least $45$ rolls and at most $55$ rolls. For $4$ trays:
$$
4\cdot 45=180
$$
$$
4\cdot 55=220
$$

steps.title: Choose a total in range
steps.content: The total number of rolls must be from $180$ through $220$, inclusive. Among the choices, only $185$ is in that range. The answer is B.
